description: Create base HTML template with navigation bar and client-side routing structure
steps: Step 1: Access application in browser and verify navigation bar is visible at top
Step 2: Click navigation links and verify page transitions work via hash routing
Step 3: Verify active page indicator shows correct page in navigation bar

description: Navigation bar styling with primary color (#2c5282) and responsive design
steps: Step 1: Navigate to application home page
Step 2: Take screenshot and verify navigation bar has primary color background
Step 3: Resize browser to mobile width (<768px) and verify collapsible menu works

description: Implement Statistics Dashboard HTML structure with summary cards, charts section, and metrics table
steps: Step 1: Navigate to Statistics Dashboard page
Step 2: Verify summary cards section exists with placeholders for metrics
Step 3: Verify charts section containers and metrics table structure are present

description: Statistics Dashboard styling with proper layout hierarchy and card components
steps: Step 1: Navigate to Statistics Dashboard
Step 2: Take screenshot and verify cards have 8px rounded corners and subtle shadow
Step 3: Verify proper spacing between sections and visual hierarchy (headings, body text)

description: Integrate Chart.js for per-class metrics visualization (recall, precision, FPR bar charts)
steps: Step 1: Load a dataset with multiple classes
Step 2: Navigate to Statistics Dashboard
Step 3: Verify bar charts render for recall, precision, and FPR with correct data

description: Chart styling with distinct colors for each class and interactive tooltips
steps: Step 1: Navigate to Statistics Dashboard with loaded data
Step 2: Take screenshot and verify charts have distinct colors for each class bar
Step 3: Hover over chart bars and verify tooltips display exact metric values

description: Implement interactive sliders for IoU threshold (0.3-0.9) and confidence threshold (0.0-1.0) with real-time updates
steps: Step 1: Navigate to Statistics Dashboard
Step 2: Move IoU slider to different value and verify charts update
Step 3: Move confidence slider and verify prediction data is filtered correctly

description: Slider styling with primary color track and custom thumb design
steps: Step 1: Navigate to Statistics Dashboard
Step 2: Take screenshot of sliders in default state
Step 3: Take screenshot while dragging slider and verify visual feedback (thumb color, track fill)

description: Implement sortable metrics table with Class, GT Count, Pred Count, TP, FP, FN, Recall, Precision, FPR, F1 Score columns
steps: Step 1: Navigate to Statistics Dashboard
Step 2: Click table header to sort and verify rows reorder correctly
Step 3: Use search box and verify table filters by class name

description: Metrics table styling with zebra striping, hover states, and sortable indicators
steps: Step 1: Navigate to Statistics Dashboard
Step 2: Take screenshot and verify alternating row background colors
Step 3: Hover over rows and verify highlight effect appears

description: Implement Image Comparison View two-column layout (25% left panel for list, 75% right panel for detail view)
steps: Step 1: Navigate to Image Comparison View
Step 2: Verify left panel contains image list with thumbnails
Step 3: Verify right panel contains image display and per-image statistics

description: Responsive layout for Image Comparison View (single column on mobile, 30/70 on tablet, 25/75 on desktop)
steps: Step 1: Navigate to Image Comparison View at desktop width (>1024px)
Step 2: Take screenshot and verify 25/75 column layout
Step 3: Resize to mobile (<768px) and take screenshot verifying single column layout

description: Implement image list with thumbnails, search, and class/status filters
steps: Step 1: Navigate to Image Comparison View
Step 2: Use search box and verify list filters by filename
Step 3: Apply class filter and verify only images with specified class are shown

description: Image list item styling with thumbnails, status indicators (color dots), and hover/active states
steps: Step 1: Navigate to Image Comparison View
Step 2: Take screenshot and verify each item has thumbnail, filename, and status color dot
Step 3: Click an item and verify active state styling (bold text, colored border)

description: Implement canvas overlay for bounding box rendering with TP (green), FP (red), FN (red) styling and icons
steps: Step 1: Select an image with ground truth and prediction boxes
Step 2: Verify TP boxes have green border and checkmark (✓) indicator
Step 3: Verify FP boxes have red border and cross (✗) indicator
Step 4: Verify FN boxes have red border and dash (—) indicator

description: Bounding box visual design with 2px borders, 24x24px corner indicators, and semi-transparent labels
steps: Step 1: Select an image with multiple box types
Step 2: Take screenshot and verify all boxes have 2px border width
Step 3: Verify corner indicators are 24x24px squares with appropriate icons
Step 4: Verify labels have semi-transparent background with contrasting text

description: Implement toggle buttons for showing/hiding GT boxes, prediction boxes, and labels
steps: Step 1: Click 'Hide GT Boxes' toggle and verify ground truth boxes disappear
Step 2: Click 'Hide Prediction Boxes' toggle and verify prediction boxes disappear
Step 3: Click 'Hide Labels' toggle and verify labels disappear while boxes remain

description: Implement zoom/pan functionality for detailed image inspection
steps: Step 1: Click zoom (+) button and verify image scales up
Step 2: Click zoom (-) button and verify image scales down
Step 3: Click reset zoom button and verify image returns to default scale
Step 4: Drag zoomed image and verify panning works

description: Implement per-image statistics table showing Class, GT, Pred, TP, FP, FN breakdown
steps: Step 1: Select an image with detections
Step 2: Scroll to per-image statistics section
Step 3: Verify table shows correct counts for each class present in image

description: Per-image statistics section styling with summary card and breakdown table
steps: Step 1: Select an image
Step 2: Take screenshot and verify summary card with filename and dimensions
Step 3: Verify breakdown table has proper column alignment (center for numbers, left for text)

description: Implement previous/next navigation buttons for sequential image viewing
steps: Step 1: Select first image in list
Step 2: Click 'Next' button and verify second image is loaded
Step 3: Click 'Previous' button and verify first image is loaded again

description: Implement loading overlay with spinner during data processing
steps: Step 1: Trigger dataset loading by providing a dataset path
Step 2: Verify semi-transparent overlay appears with rotating spinner
Step 3: Verify overlay disappears after data processing completes

description: Loading overlay styling with gradient border spinner and backdrop blur
steps: Step 1: Trigger dataset loading
Step 2: Take screenshot and verify overlay is semi-transparent with backdrop blur
Step 3: Verify spinner has gradient border and smooth rotation animation

description: Implement error modal with user-friendly messages for invalid dataset paths
steps: Step 1: Provide an invalid dataset path
Step 2: Verify error modal appears with descriptive message
Step 3: Click close button and verify modal dismisses

description: Error modal styling with clear title, descriptive message, and close button
steps: Step 1: Trigger an error condition
Step 2: Take screenshot and verify modal has clear error title and message
Step 3: Verify close button is prominently styled and easily clickable

description: Implement empty state handling when no dataset is loaded
steps: Step 1: Navigate to Statistics Dashboard without loading dataset
Step 2: Verify empty state message is displayed
Step 3: Verify 'Load Dataset' button is available and functional

description: Empty state design with helpful illustration and clear call-to-action
steps: Step 1: Navigate to pages without loaded dataset
Step 2: Take screenshot and verify empty state has helpful message and icon/illustration
Step 3: Verify call-to-action button is prominently displayed with primary styling

description: Implement keyboard navigation (Tab, Enter for list selection, arrow keys for image navigation)
steps: Step 1: Navigate to Image Comparison View
Step 2: Use Tab key to focus on image list items and press Enter to select
Step 3: Use arrow keys to navigate between images when image view is focused

description: Implement accessibility features (alt text for images, screen reader labels)
steps: Step 1: Inspect HTML and verify all images have alt attributes
Step 2: Verify all interactive elements have ARIA labels where appropriate
Step 3: Test with screen reader to verify proper navigation and announcements

description: Integrate Font Awesome icons for visual indicators (check, cross, dash)
steps: Step 1: Select an image with TP boxes and verify check icon renders
Step 2: Verify FP boxes show cross icon and FN boxes show dash icon
Step 3: Verify icons are properly sized and positioned

description: Icon styling with correct colors (green for TP, red for FP/FN) and positioning
steps: Step 1: Select image with multiple box types
Step 2: Take screenshot and verify TP icons are green (#22c55e)
Step 3: Verify FP/FN icons are red (#ef4444) and positioned at top-left of boxes

description: Overall design system consistency (color palette, typography, spacing) across all pages
steps: Step 1: Navigate to Statistics Dashboard and take screenshot
Step 2: Navigate to Image Comparison View and take screenshot
Step 3: Compare screenshots and verify consistent color palette, typography, and spacing

description: Implement dataset load modal with path input field and load button
steps: Step 1: Click 'Load Dataset' button
Step 2: Verify modal opens with input field for dataset path
Step 3: Enter valid path and click load, verify dataset loads successfully

description: Modal styling with centered positioning, backdrop, and proper input/button styling
steps: Step 1: Open dataset load modal
Step 2: Take screenshot and verify modal is centered with backdrop blur
Step 3: Verify input field and load button follow design system (rounded corners, proper padding)

description: Implement confidence score distribution visualization for current image predictions
steps: Step 1: Select an image with multiple predictions at different confidence levels
Step 2: Scroll to per-image statistics section
Step 3: Verify confidence histogram or distribution visualization is displayed

description: Confidence distribution chart styling with appropriate bins and color gradient
steps: Step 1: Select image with varied confidence predictions
Step 2: Take screenshot of confidence distribution chart
Step 3: Verify chart has proper bin distribution and color gradient from low to high confidence

description: Implement JSON parsing for prediction files with confidence scores
steps: Step 1: Create a sample prediction JSON file with valid format including confidence scores
Step 2: Parse file and verify bbox coordinates and confidence scores are extracted correctly
Step 3: Parse file with multiple predictions and verify all data is captured

description: Initialize Flask project structure with proper directory layout (app/, app/static/, app/templates/)
steps: Step 1: Check that app.py exists in project root
Step 2: Verify static directory exists with subdirectories (css/, js/)
Step 3: Verify templates directory exists with base.html
Step 4: Verify requirements.txt includes all required dependencies (flask>=2.0.0, flask-cors>=3.0.10, pillow>=9.0.0, numpy>=1.21.0)

description: Configure Flask application with CORS support and static file serving
steps: Step 1: Start Flask server with python run.py
Step 2: Access /api/health endpoint and verify JSON response with status: 'healthy'
Step 3: Verify static files are served correctly by accessing /static path

description: Create SQLite database schema with all required tables (dataset_metadata, image_metadata, classes, bounding_boxes)
steps: Step 1: Initialize application and trigger database creation
Step 2: Check that dataset_analysis.db file exists
Step 3: Verify all four tables exist with correct columns (use SQLite browser or sqlite3 command)

description: Implement dataset validation function to check for required directories (images/, gt/, predictions/)
steps: Step 1: Provide a valid dataset path to validation function
Step 2: Verify function returns success if all directories exist
Step 3: Provide an invalid path and verify appropriate error message is returned

description: Implement JSON parsing for ground truth annotation files with bbox coordinates
steps: Step 1: Create a sample ground truth JSON file with valid format
Step 2: Parse file and verify bbox coordinates are extracted correctly (x1, y1, x2, y2)
Step 3: Parse file with multiple annotations and verify all classes and boxes are captured

description: Implement thumbnail generation using Pillow for all images (150x150px)
steps: Step 1: Load a sample image through thumbnail generation function
Step 2: Verify thumbnail file is created in thumbnails directory
Step 3: Verify thumbnail dimensions are 150x150px with aspect ratio preserved

description: Implement IoU calculation function for bounding box matching
steps: Step 1: Test with two perfectly overlapping boxes (IoU should be 1.0)
Step 2: Test with two non-overlapping boxes (IoU should be 0.0)
Step 3: Test with partially overlapping boxes and verify IoU value between 0.0 and 1.0

description: Implement bounding box classification (TP/FP/FN) based on IoU threshold
steps: Step 1: Provide ground truth and prediction boxes with IoU >= threshold (should be classified as TP)
Step 2: Provide prediction without matching GT (should be classified as FP)
Step 3: Provide GT without matching prediction (should be classified as FN)

description: Implement metric calculation functions (recall, precision, FPR, F1 Score) per class
steps: Step 1: Calculate recall for a class with known TP and FN values, verify formula TP/(TP+FN)
Step 2: Calculate precision for a class with known TP and FP values, verify formula TP/(TP+FP)
Step 3: Calculate F1 Score using precision and recall, verify formula 2*(P*R)/(P+R)

description: Implement API endpoint POST /api/dataset/load for dataset loading and parsing
steps: Step 1: Send POST request with valid dataset_path and iou_threshold
Step 2: Verify response includes success: true, dataset_id, total_images, total_classes
Step 3: Verify database contains entries for all loaded images and classes

description: Implement API endpoint GET /api/statistics/:dataset_id for retrieving per-class statistics
steps: Step 1: Load a dataset and get the dataset_id
Step 2: Call GET /api/statistics/:dataset_id endpoint
Step 3: Verify response contains classes array with all metrics (recall, precision, fpr, f1_score)

description: Implement API endpoint POST /api/statistics/recalculate for threshold adjustment
steps: Step 1: Send POST request with new iou_threshold and confidence_threshold
Step 2: Verify response success: true and statistics are updated
Step 3: Verify database entries reflect of new threshold values

description: Implement API endpoint GET /api/images/:dataset_id for paginated image list
steps: Step 1: Call GET /api/images/:dataset_id with pagination parameters
Step 2: Verify response returns correct number of images based on page and per_page
Step 3: Verify each image entry contains filename, thumbnail_path, and basic stats

description: Implement API endpoint GET /api/images/:dataset_id/:image_id for detailed image data
steps: Step 1: Call GET /api/images/:dataset_id/:image_id for a specific image
Step 2: Verify response contains filename, dimensions, ground_truth_boxes, prediction_boxes
Step 3: Verify per_class_stats includes counts and metrics for each class

description: Implement API endpoint GET /api/statistics/export/:dataset_id for CSV/JSON export
steps: Step 1: Call export endpoint with format='csv' parameter
Step 2: Verify response is valid CSV with header row containing metric columns
Step 3: Call export endpoint with format='json' and verify valid JSON structure
